name: canshare-tnm-haematology-mf-or-ss-cn
title: NZ AJCC haematology mycosis fungoides or sezary syndrome clinical N category
description: A clinical regional lymph node stage (cN) of a mycosis fungoides or sezary syndrome cutaneous lymphoma before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
